PainPoints.label: Day to day
PainPoints.title: What usually complicates your planning
PainPoints.subtitle: With Vitaflix, these blocks stop hindering your routine and planning becomes light and fast.

time.title: Little Time
time.desc: Between work, family and routine, planning balanced meals always ends up being left for later.

flavor.title: Flavorless Meals
flavor.desc: Many options seem repetitive and unappealing, making it difficult to maintain consistency.

doubt.title: Constant Doubt
doubt.desc: Deciding what to cook every day consumes time and energy you could use on other priorities.

variety.title: Lack of Variety
variety.desc: You end up repeating the same meals because you don't have a simple system to vary.

quantity.title: Uncertain Quantities
quantity.desc: Without clear guidance, it is difficult to adjust portions to your goal and maintain consistent results.

SolutionFeatures.imageLabel: Real recipes for your daily life
SolutionFeatures.title: Everything in one place
SolutionFeatures.subtitle: Introducing the definitive solution. With Vitaflix, you don't lose time, you just gain health and control over your meals.

premium.title: Premium Experience
premium.desc: Clean, fast interface designed for daily use.

practical.title: Practical Results
practical.desc: Decide in minutes what to cook for the whole week.

recipes.title: +300 Recipes
recipes.desc: Real variety for all tastes, without monotony.

calories.title: Caloric Variations
calories.desc: The same meal adapted to various goals (loss, gain, focus).

shopping.title: Automatic Shopping List
shopping.desc: Don't waste time with unnecessary trips to the supermarket.

planning.title: Weekly Planning
planning.desc: Intuitive tool to organize the whole week at a glance.

filters.title: Smart Filters
filters.desc: Find what you want (meat, fish, vegan, lactose-free) in a second.

success.message: Spot guaranteed — you'll be among the first to know when we launch.

Founder.label: Method Credibility
Founder.title: Behind Vitaflix is a method, not promises
Founder.subtitle: The app was designed based on field experience and real monitoring to make meal planning simpler, more consistent, and sustainable.

tech.title: Solid Technical Base
tech.desc: Methodology built with Physical Education training and real practice with students.

progress.title: Sustainable Progression
progress.desc: Focus on consistency and evolution over time, without extreme shortcuts or short-term solutions.

routine.title: Applicable Routine
routine.desc: Meal planning that fits into daily life, with simple and repeatable decisions.

Founder.box: The methodology was developed by Bruno Cortez with a focus on sustainable results and has already helped hundreds of students lose weight, gain muscle mass, and maintain consistent habits.
Founder.button: I want access to these recipes

Testimonials.label: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What our users say
Testimonials.subtitle: Real stories of change, consistency, and sustainable results.

raquel.name: Raquel Araújo
raquel.quote:
Your guidance helped a lot and it will help even more!
I have support, I have plenty of recipes to choose from. It never gets boring, and if I feel like something different there is always a way to fit it into the diet!

vania.name: Vânia Gandra
vania.quote:
You ended up becoming part of my routines.
You were a huge help to start the exercise journey: your constant presence and your feedback on the videos.
Your help to keep motivation and your support in the less good weeks.
Having someone always pushing me back to the right path so I wouldn’t get lost.
Without you, losing these 35 kg wouldn’t have been possible.
Thank you for everything.

bia.name: Bia Antunes
bia.quote:
Your guidance is simply incredible. Before joining, I did crazy diets because I kept thinking I was fat (even when I wasn’t), and it got extreme.
I decided to join because I’d been following your work for a while, and when I joined my perspective completely changed.
I started eating much more and training to build muscle and gain confidence. Now I feel so much better and I have more energy throughout the day.
Whenever people ask what I’m doing, I always recommend this program. It builds confidence and gives you a much healthier relationship with food.
In my case, I stopped being afraid to eat because I was afraid of gaining weight.
And you’re always available for any questions, and you don’t rest until everything is clear.
A complete program with nutrition and training, whether at home or in the gym. Truly incredible.

filomena.name: Filomena Brás
filomena.quote:
Since I started training with Bruno, my relationship with exercise has completely changed.
I have a demanding life, long work hours, and two kids, so finding time for myself felt almost impossible. Being able to train at home, when I can, made all the difference.
Workouts are adapted to what I have at home and to my needs, which makes everything realistic and easier to fit into my routine.
During my pregnancy, this support became even more special. Bruno adjusted the exercises for each phase so I could stay active, safe, and confident.
Even on days when I’m tired, the close follow-up and constant motivation make it much easier to keep going.
More than workouts, I feel like I gained a sustainable way to take care of myself in the middle of a full life.

carolina.name: Carolina Pinto
carolina.quote:
Over this year you helped me in many ways, but the most important was learning that weight loss is a lifestyle change, not a crazy diet.
One of the best parts is that I can still eat everything, including my favorite dishes, without guilt.
On top of that, you’re realistic and you adapt things to my life, even when life is unpredictable.
In other programs I often felt guilty for not following the plan perfectly, but I never felt that pressure from you.
That helped me look at this process with more kindness and appreciate every step along the way.

Recipes.title: Exclusive Recipes
Recipes.subtitle: Created by Bruno for the app

Pricing.title: Invest in your routine
Pricing.subtitle: Simple and transparent plans. No fine print or long contracts.

monthly.name: Monthly Plan
monthly.desc: Ideal for those who just want to test.

Faq.label: No complications
Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Vitaflix.

cancel.a: Yes, absolutely. Your subscription can be canceled at any time, directly in your account settings, with no questions or tricks.

devices.q: Is it available for Android and iPhone?
devices.a: Yes, Vitaflix is available and optimized on both the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android).

support.q: Does the app include personalized monitoring?
support.a: No. Vitaflix is a creative meal organization tool. Our focus is to give you total autonomy and enormous practical sense, not including consultations or chat monitoring.

shopping.q: Does the app create an automatic shopping list?
shopping.a: Yes! Vitaflix automatically generates a shopping list organized by supermarket sections, based on the recipes you choose for your week.

diet.q: Are there vegetarian or vegan options?
diet.a: Yes, our database includes several vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options, allowing you to filter recipes according to your dietary preferences.

payments.a: Payments are processed securely through the App Store (Apple) or Google Play Store (Android), ensuring full protection of your data.

Cta.title: Ready to transform your
Cta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and be one of the first to try Vitaflix. Simplify your planning and reach your goals.
Cta.footer: Exclusive access for the first subscribers.

Footer.desc: Simplified meal planning for busy people. Save time, eat better, and reach your goals without stress.

contact.help: Questions? We are here to help on your journey.

privacyModal.title: VITAFLIX — PRIVACY POLICY
privacyModal.intro: This policy explains how Vitaflix collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Data Collected
bullets: Identification: Name, email, age.
Profile: Gender, weight, goals.
Health and Habits: Data voluntarily entered about nutrition, exercise, and recorded habits.
Technical Data: IP address, device type, access logs, and approximate geolocation.

sections.title: 2. Sensitive Data (Health)
paragraphs: Health-related data is considered a special category of data (Art. 9 GDPR). Vitaflix processes this data only with your explicit consent, provided when using the app's logging and planning features.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
bullets: Personalize the user experience and generate plan suggestions.
Process payments and subscriptions.
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud or improper account sharing.
Improve the app's technical and functional performance.

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis
paragraphs: Processing is based on subscription contract execution, user consent, and compliance with legal and tax obligations.

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing
paragraphs: Payment data is shared exclusively with Stripe and PayPal platforms. Vitaflix does not sell or trade users' personal data with third parties.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention and Technical Security
paragraphs: Data is retained while the account is active.

Security note: Even after account deletion is requested, Vitaflix will retain transaction data, identification data, and access logs for the legal period of 10 years for tax purposes and defense of rights in financial disputes or chargebacks.

sections.title: 7. User Rights
paragraphs: Under GDPR, the user has the right to Access, Rectification, Erasure, Portability, and Objection.

sections.title: 8. Visual Content Transparency
paragraphs: Vitaflix uses original photographs of its recipes. We inform that images may undergo color and lighting editing to improve the visual experience on the platform, without affecting the truthfulness of the ingredients shown.

sections.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking
paragraphs: The platform uses technical cookies for session management and analytics tools to measure service efficiency and security. Users can manage cookie preferences on their device.

sections.title: 10. Security
paragraphs: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or accidental destruction.

sections.title: 11. Changes
paragraphs: This policy may be updated periodically. Changes take effect after publication on the platform and notification to users.

termsModal.title: VITAFLIX — TERMS & CONDITIONS
termsModal.intro: These terms define the rules for using Vitaflix and your subscription rights and obligations.

sections.title: 1. Purpose and License of Use
paragraphs: Vitaflix is a subscription-based digital platform that provides educational content, recipes, and planning tools for a healthy lifestyle. By subscribing, Vitaflix grants the user a temporary, personal, revocable, and non-exclusive license of use, strictly conditioned on maintaining an active subscription.
Vitaflix does not provide personalized medical, nutritional, or therapeutic advice. The content is for informational purposes only and does not replace follow-up with qualified health professionals.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
paragraphs: Use of the platform is only permitted for users aged 18 or older. The user declares that all information provided during registration is true, complete, and up to date.

sections.title: 3. User Account and Security
paragraphs: The account is personal, individual, and non-transferable.
bullets: Security: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials.
Device Limitation: Access is limited to use on personal devices.

Monitoring: Vitaflix reserves the right to monitor access patterns (including IP addresses, geolocation, and device identification). Systematic access through incompatible geographic locations or distinct IPs within short time intervals will be flagged as abusive use, resulting in immediate account suspension without refund for breach of terms.

sections.title: 4. Subscriptions, Payments, and Renewal
bullets: 4.1 Subscription Types: Vitaflix offers quarterly and annual subscription plans.
4.2 Payments: Processed securely via Stripe or PayPal. Vitaflix does not store bank or card data.
4.3 Automatic Renewal: Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each period unless canceled by the user before the renewal date.

4.4 Cancellation and End of Access: Cancellation prevents future renewals, while access remains until the end of the already paid period. After the active subscription period ends, access to the platform, recipes, saved plans, and history is immediately revoked. There is no ownership right, download right, or offline access to the content.

sections.title: 5. Waiver of the Right of Withdrawal (Digital Content)
paragraphs: By subscribing to Vitaflix, the user acknowledges and expressly accepts that:
bullets: 1. Access to digital content is made available immediately after payment confirmation.
2. Under Article 17 of Decree-Law no. 24/2014, the user consents to the immediate execution of the service.
3. The user acknowledges that they lose the right of withdrawal (14-day refund) as soon as access to the platform begins or the first login is performed.
For this reason, refunds are not granted after use of the service has started.

sections.title: 6. Chargebacks, Disputes, and Proof of Use
paragraphs: In case of a payment dispute (chargeback) or claim with financial institutions:
bullets: Vitaflix will provide technical access logs (IP, date, time, and usage history) as irrefutable proof of delivery and effective use of the digital service.
Vitaflix reserves the right to suspend the account and block future subscriptions associated with the same user, email, or payment method in case of fraud or unjustified dispute.

sections.title: 7. User Responsibility and Health
paragraphs: The user assumes full responsibility for decisions made based on the content. Calorie suggestions and plans are for guidance only. Medical consultation is mandatory before following any plan, especially in case of allergies, chronic diseases, pregnancy, or breastfeeding. Vitaflix is not liable for adverse effects resulting from misinterpretation or improper application of recipes.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property and Visual Content
paragraphs: All content (texts, design, trademarks, and software) is the exclusive property of Vitaflix.
bullets: Real Images: The recipe photographs shown are real and original productions.

Visual Editing: Visual content may undergo editing processes (color, brightness, and contrast optimization) for aesthetic and clarity purposes. Final results of recipes prepared by the user may vary, and images have an illustrative character of the potential outcome.
Prohibition: Any reproduction, copying, distribution, or commercial use of content without prior written authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 9. Communications
paragraphs: Vitaflix may send service-related notifications and promotional communications. The user may opt out of promotional communications at any time in account settings.

sections.title: 10. Changes to the Terms
paragraphs: Vitaflix reserves the right to update these Terms. Changes will be notified in the app or by email. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 11. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Portuguese and European Union law. Any dispute will be submitted to the Portuguese courts in the district of the platform's headquarters.
